meta.source: vignanam.org — IAST transliteration, corrected against Chris Hughes lineage
meta.notes: v1.1: Parameshvara-Parameshvari combined; Uddiishamayi added; Kaalataapaana corrected; Garima Siddhe removed; translation and note fields added.

scripts.iast: ōṃ aiṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ aiṃ klīṃ sauḥ ōṃ namastripurasundarī
scripts.devanagari: ओं ऐं ह्रीं श्रीं ऐं क्लीं सौः ओं नमस्त्रिपुरसुन्दरी
scripts.english: Om Aim Hrim Shrim Aim Klim Sauh Om Namas Tripura Sundari
scripts.marathi: ओं ऐं ह्रीं श्रीं ऐं क्लीं सौः ओं नमस्त्रिपुरसुन्दरी
scripts.hindi: ओं ऐं ह्रीं श्रीं ऐं क्लीं सौः ओं नमस्त्रिपुरसुन्दरी
scripts.telugu: ఓం ఐం హ్రీం శ్రీం ఐం క్లీం సౌః ఓం నమస్త్రిపురసున్దరీ
scripts.tamil: ஓம் ஐம் ஹ்ரீம் ஶ்ரீம் ஐம் க்லீம் ஸௌஃ ஓம் நமஸ்த்ரிபுரஸுந்தரீ
scripts.kannada: ಓಂ ಐಂ ಹ್ರೀಂ ಶ್ರೀಂ ಐಂ ಕ್ಲೀಂ ಸೌಃ ಓಂ ನಮಸ್ತ್ರಿಪುರಸುನ್ದರೀ
scripts.malayalam: ഓം ഐം ഹ്രീം ശ്രീം ഐം ക്ലീം സൌഃ ഓം നമസ്ത്രിപുരസുംദരീ

scripts.translation: The Divine God and Divine Goddess
scripts.kana: パラメーシュヴァラ・パラメーシュヴァリー

deities.note: Chanted as a pair — the primordial divine couple

translations.en: The Divine God and Divine Goddess
translations.fr: Le Dieu Divin et la Déesse Divine
translations.es: El Dios Divino y la Diosa Divina
translations.it: Il Dio Divino e la Dea Divina
translations.pt: O Deus Divino e a Deusa Divina
translations.de: Der Göttliche Gott und die Göttliche Göttin

notes.en: Chanted as a pair — the primordial divine couple
notes.fr: Chanté en paire — couple divin primordial
notes.es: Cantado en pareja — la pareja divina primordial
notes.it: Cantato in coppia — la coppia divina primordiale
notes.pt: Cantado em par — o casal divino primordial
notes.de: Als Paar gesungen — das uranfängliche göttliche Paar

scripts.kana: ミトレーシャマイー

deities.note: Mitrēśa ('lord of friends') is a form of Śiva; second in the divine lineage

notes.en: Mitrēśa ('lord of friends') is a form of Śiva; second in the divine lineage
notes.fr: Mitresha est une forme de Shiva ; second dans la lignée
notes.es: Mitresha es una forma de Shiva; segundo en el linaje
notes.it: Mitresha è una forma di Shiva; secondo nella lignea
notes.pt: Mitresha é uma forma de Shiva; segundo na linhagem
notes.de: Mitresha ist eine Form Shivas; zweiter in der Linie

scripts.kana: シャシュティーシャマイー

deities.note: Ṣaṣṭhīśa is a form of Śiva; third in the divine lineage

notes.en: Ṣaṣṭhīśa is a form of Śiva; third in the divine lineage
notes.fr: Shashthisha est une forme de Shiva ; troisième
notes.es: Shashthisha es una forma de Shiva; tercero
notes.it: Shashthisha è una forma di Shiva; terzo
notes.pt: Shashthisha é uma forma de Shiva; terceiro
notes.de: Shashthisha ist eine Form Shivas; dritter

scripts.kana: ウッディーシャマイー
チャルヤーナータマイー

deities.note: Caryānātha is a master revered in both Śaiva and Nātha traditions; fifth in the divine lineage

notes.en: Caryānātha is a master revered in both Śaiva and Nātha traditions; fifth in the divine lineage
notes.fr: Caryanatha — maître des traditions Shaiva et Natha
notes.es: Caryanatha — maestro de las tradiciones Shaiva y Natha
notes.it: Caryanatha — maestro nelle tradizioni Shaiva e Natha
notes.pt: Caryanatha — mestre das tradições Shaiva e Natha
notes.de: Caryanatha — Meister der Shaiva- und Natha-Traditionen

scripts.kana: ローパームドラマイー

deities.note: Wife of Agastya and a great adept in her own right; co-revealer of Śrī Vidyā and author of hymns in the Ṛgveda

notes.en: Wife of Agastya and a great adept in her own right; co-revealer of Śrī Vidyā and author of hymns in the Ṛgveda
notes.fr: Épouse d'Agastya ; co-révélatrice de Sri Vidya
notes.es: Esposa de Agastya; co-reveladora de Sri Vidya
notes.it: Moglie di Agastya; co-rivelatrice di Sri Vidya
notes.pt: Esposa de Agastya; co-reveladora de Sri Vidya
notes.de: Ehefrau von Agastya; Mitoffenbarerin der Sri Vidya

scripts.kana: アガストヤマイー

deities.note: Vedic sage and one of the Saptaṛṣis; widely credited with transmitting Śrī Vidyā to South India

notes.en: Vedic sage and one of the Saptaṛṣis; widely credited with transmitting Śrī Vidyā to South India

notes.pt: Sábio védico transmissor de Sri Vidya ao sul da Índia
notes.de: Vedischer Weiser, der Sri Vidya nach Südindien übermittelte
